Le chirurgien plasticien José Soler-Baillo, qui exerce à Miami, est devenu viral après la publication de vidéos filmées pendant ses opérations. En plein bloc opératoire, il s’ambiance sur de la house. Une pratique courante chez certains chirurgiens, car la diffusion de musique peut favoriser la concentration et créer un climat de travail plus détendu. Cependant, il est beaucoup plus rare de voir des images tournées pendant les opérations être publiées sur les réseaux sociaux. Crédit : @drsolerbaillo / IG

How I got my cat to be comfortable with opening mouth  Tips:  1. Whiskers are very sensitive, please take things slow, give lots of breaks, and be patient and gentle with your kitties 2. Don’t force mouth open or hold for extended amount of time as part of desensitization  3. Kitty will likely resist at first, be gentle and patient. You’re making progress even if they open a tiny bit or open for a moment This has made Mogi’s dental care and vet exams so easy. I can also fish things out of his mouth when things get stuck or if he eats something he’s not supposed to.  #cat #kitten #catsoftiktok #cutecat #fyp

This routine is for anyone who is not dealing with extreme damage but wants over all glossier & softer hair this is the the exact routine I built for getting glass hair on fine hair but will work for the wavy curly hair girls too!!  the science: the flatten your cuticle lies, the more light it reflects that's what gives the illusion of glass. glossy hair isn't a product, it's the consistency of routine over time that’s keeping that cuticle smooth from prewash to final styling  it took me a while to figure out the system, but once I did, the results compounded and now I wanna share my favourite tips with you because this is the routine that actually for every  wash day. the 5 things I never skip: 1. always create a barrier before shampoo: hair oil or conditioner first. less friction = less cuticle damage = more shine 2. weekly hair mask. deep hydration is what keeps that cuticle flat and the shine consistent. 3. a glossing treatment every 3-4 weeks  this is the step that takes glossy to glass  4. leave-in conditioner every single wash. beats frizz and keeps the cuticle flat between washes. 5. the hair sandwich method oil before heat styling AND after. then always finish with a cool shot to lock the cuticle in place ✨ Hope these haircare tips help you guys!! #hair #haircare #glasshair #hairgloss

the hair care routine that keeps my hair healthy ✨    all products linked on my shopmy which is linked in my bio    here’s the exact timeframe i follow each week: • i oil my hair 1–3x a week • i wash my hair based on oiliness, usually about every 2 days. i don’t follow a strict wash schedule • i use either a milk treatment, protein treatment, hair mask, or hair gloss about once a week #haircare #hairtok #healthyhair #hairroutine #hairtreatment

Recipe below!👇🏼Why spend at M&S when you can make it at home and even better 🍓☀️ ⭐️ Ingredients: - 6-8 fresh strawberries (preferably similar size) - 4 slices of soft white bread (crustless milk bread if possible) - 200ml double cream - 2 tbsp sugar - 1/2 tsp vanilla extract (optional) ⭐️ Method： 1. Wash strawberries. 2. Beat heavy cream with sugar (and vanilla if using) until stiff peaks form. 3. Spread whipped cream on bread, place strawberries, cover with more cream, and top with another bread slice. 4. Wrap tightly in plastic wrap and chill for 30 minutes. 5. Slice cleanly and enjoy! #sando #strawberrysando #strawberries #strawberriesandcream #aesthetic #trending #marksandspencer #viral #fyp #baking #baketok #dessert #explore #Recipe #EasyRecipe

Ooey-Gooey Scoopable Nutella Cookie Pie🤤 Yields: 15-16 Chunky Cookies INGREDIENTS:  230g Cold Chopped Unsalted Butter  160g Caster Sugar  160g Light Brown Sugar  450g Chocolate Chunks or chips  475g Plain Flour  1 tsp Salt 3 tsp Baking Powder  3/4 tsp Baking Soda  2 Eggs  1 Egg Yolk  1 tsp Vanilla  INSTRUCTIONS: •Cut cling wrap into small squares. Scoop ½ teaspoon Nutella onto individual cling-wrap squares. Fold to seal and freeze until solid. (Repeat for however many Nutella stuffed cookies you plan to make.) •In a large mixing bowl, add the cold cubed butter and whisk until slightly creamy. Add the white sugar and light brown sugar, then whisk together until well combined and fluffy. •Add the eggs, vanilla extract, and chocolate chips or chunks. Whisk until fully incorporated. •Add the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Gently mix until just combined, do not overmix. •Portion the dough into 90g balls. Press a frozen Nutella piece into the centre of each dough ball, seal well, and roll into a smooth ball. •Place the stuffed cookie dough balls onto a tray and freeze for at least 30 minutes (or overnight for best results). •Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). •Take any shape baking dish circle, square, rectangle anything and line it with parchment paper. Arrange frozen cookie dough balls in it leaving some space between them. •Bake for 10-15 minutes (timing depends on the type of pan) or until the tops are lightly golden while the centres remain soft and gooey. •Remove from the oven and let cool slightly. •Serve warm with ice cream and chocolate sauce enjoy!✨ NOTE: Store any extra dough balls in an airtight container or freezer bag and freeze for later. Whenever a cookie craving hits, bake straight from frozen🫶🏻 #cookie #nutella #cookiepie #fyp #viral

Recette brunch :  Recette pancakes :  - 135g farine  - 3 œufs  - 200 ml lait  - 45g sucre  - 1 sachet levure chimique  Fouetter les œufs le sucre et le lait et rajouter la farine tamisée et la levure bien mélanger jusqu’à ce qu’il n’y ait pas de grumeau.    Recette 12 cupcakes : - 150g de beurre pommade  - 150g de sucre en poudre  - 3 œufs  - 150g farine - 2 cac levure chimique  Fouetter le beurre et le sucre jusqu'à obtenir un mélange onctueux puis ajouter les œufs un par un et enfin rajouter la farine et la levure chimique. Remplir les caissettes au 3/4 puis enfourner 10 à 15 min selon le four à 180 degrés  Recette chantilly mascarpone :  - 350g mascarpone  - 40 cl crème fleurette minimum 30%  - 3 cas de sucre glace  - 1 gousse vanille  - 1 CAS arôme vanille  Placer les ustensiles et les ingrédients liquide 5/10 min au congélateur si possible, plus c’est frais, mieux c’est, tout mixer ensemble avec un fouet électrique

Crispy tortilla cones filled with juicy spiced beef and topped with melted mozzarella 🧀🔥 The perfect crunchy snack or quick dinner that everyone will love. One bite and you’re hooked 🤤 Crispy Beef Cones (12 cones) Ingredients For the cones:  • 6 tortillas (25–30 cm / 10–12 inches)  • Toothpicks For the topping:  • Mozzarella cheese, 100 g  • Chopped parsley, 1 tsp For the beef mixture:  • Ground beef, 400 g(0.8lb)   • 1 yellow onion, finely chopped  • Garlic, 4 cloves, minced  • Red bell pepper, diced (about 1 small)  • Green bell pepper, diced (about 1 small)  • Tomato paste, 1 big tbsp   • Soy milk, 100 ml (~ ½ cup) Seasoning:  • Paprika, 1 tbsp  • Chili powder, 1 tsp  • Turmeric, 1 tsp  • Garlic powder, 1 tsp  • Black pepper, 1 tsp  • Garam masala, 1 tsp  • Salt, ½ tsp Instructions 1.⁠ ⁠Prepare the beef mixture:  • Heat a little oil in a pan over medium heat. Add the onion and sauté until soft.  • Add the minced garlic and cook 30 seconds until fragrant.  • Add the ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it apart as it cooks.  • Stir in tomato paste, soy milk, diced bell peppers, and all seasonings. Cook until slightly thickened. Remove from heat and let cool slightly. 2.⁠ ⁠Prepare the cones:  • Cut tortillas in half. Roll each half into a cone shape and secure the edge with a toothpick. Baking Method:  1. Preheat oven to 190°C (375°F).  2. Place cones on a baking tray lined with parchment paper. Lightly spray with cooking spray.  3. Bake for 10–12 minutes until crispy and golden.  4. Fill each cone with the beef mixture and top with mozzarella cheese.  5. Return to oven for 5 minutes until cheese melts.  6. Garnish with parsley and serve warm. Air Fryer Method:   1. Preheat air fryer to 180°C (356°F).  2. Lightly spray cones with cooking spray and place them in the air fryer basket. Make sure they don’t touch each other.  3. Air fry for 6–8 minutes until crispy and golden.  4. Carefully fill each cone with the beef mixture and top with mozzarella cheese.  5. Air fry again for 3–4 minutes until cheese melts.  6. Garnish with parsley and serve warm. #crispybeef #quickrecipes #EasyRecipes #lazydinner #beefcones

As promised, this is my current scalp care routine! I previously didn’t think additional scalp care would do much for me, but the research behind the Pantene Abundant & Strong system (and all the research I’ve found on other scalp ingredients / products since) really changed my mind. Now I think about my scalp care routine as a proactive routine to keep my scalp + new hair growth in the healthiest state possible. This isn’t a routine that I think everyone *needs* to do, but for those who are also interested in promoting scalp health & improving hair retention, hopefully this gives you some steps to choose from that might help! Also- the results I’ve seen would only be from the scalp serums + shampoos alone because I haven’t been using the scalp device or red light helmet long enough to see any visible change yet. LMK if you want videos on my top recommendations for scalp serums + scalp focused shampoos next! Products Mentioned: 1. Pantene Abundant & Strong Serum 2. Neutrogena Hair Restore Serum  3. OGX Pro Growth + Peptide Shampoo 4. Dr Groot Scalp Revitalizing Hair Thickening Shampoo 5. DS Labs Scalp Activator - this was gifted with no obligation to review 6. Current Body Red Light Helmet - this was gifted with no obligation to review #scalpcare #hairroutine #haircareroutine #healthyhair

double chocolate dipped strawberry banana bread muffins, perfect for valentines🤎    recipe:   ingredients 3 ripe bananas ½ cup neutral oil (110 g) ¾ cup granulated sugar (150 g) ¼ cup brown sugar (55 g) 2 large eggs rt  ¼ cup sour cream or greek yogurt (60 g) 1 tsp vanilla (5 g) 2 cups all-purpose flour (240 g) ½ cup cocoa powder (45 g) 1¼ tsp baking soda (6 g) ½ tsp salt (3 g) ½ tsp instant coffee  dark chocolate chips or chunks 6-7 strawberries chopped  instructions preheat the oven to 425°F and line a muffin tin. in a large bowl, whisk together the mashed bananas, oil, sugars, eggs, sour cream, and vanilla until smooth and glossy. in a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, instant coffee, and salt. fold the dry ingredients into the wet just until combined, then gently fold in the chocolate and strawberries  fill the muffin liners almost all the way to the top. top with strawberries and chocolate & bake at 425°F for 5 minutes, then without opening the oven door, reduce the temperature to 350°F and continue baking for 14–17 minutes, until the tops are domed and a toothpick comes out with moist crumbs. let cool a bit before transferring to a cooling rack. #chocolate #strawberry #bananabread #muffins #Recipe

日本のおすすめ抹茶スイーツまとめ8選/Food Travel in Japan🍵 ①三軒茶屋「PARKSTORE」抹茶クリームドーナツ ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ ②押上「あんみつの深緑堂」抹茶ぜんざい　 ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ ③愛知「T-bearcafe」抹茶いちご大福ソフト ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ ④渋谷「ななや青山店」抹茶チョコ食べ比べセット ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ ⑤ 田原町「marblecafe」ベイクドチーズケーキ+抹茶アフォガード ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ ⑥ 吉祥寺「capoon抹茶製造所」抹茶ロールケーキ ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ ⑦三越前「IPPUKU&MATCHA」抹茶バスクチーズケーキ&抹茶プリン ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ ⑧銀座「Mercerbis」抹茶シフォンケーキ ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ どれが一番食べてみたい？ ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ #東京グルメ #東京カフェ #抹茶 #matcha #japanesefood

Recipe 👩🏻‍🍳 75g butter  65g brown sugar 30g granulated sugar 1 egg  100g all purpose flour  1/4tsp bicarbonate soda  1/8tsp baking powder 120g chopped chocolate  Instructions ✨ ~ Melt the butter  ~ Add the granulated and brown sugar to the melted butter and stir until the sugars have dissolved  ~ Add the egg and mix  ~ Add the baking powder, bicarbonate soda and flour and combine until smooth ~ Fold in the chocolate chunks  ~ Put half of the cookie dough in a dish, then add 2 tablespoons of chocolate spread  ~ Add the rest of the dough ontop  ~ Bake at 180 degrees (gas mark 4) for 10 minutes then 160 degrees (gas mark 3) for 5 minutes  ~ Allow it to cool before serving  ~Enjoy! #bake #baking #BakeWithMe #cookie #cookies #skilletcookie #dessert #chocolate #bakewithme #fyp #fypシ #fypage #fypppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppp
